input: AI system that ranks job applicants by CV

expected.notes: v0.1.3 launch-feedback BLOCKER 1 (both Claude-Code + Codex reviewers). The classifier's README + --help example was 'AI system that ranks job applicants by CV' but v0.1.2 returned 'no obligations triggered'. v0.1.3 expanded the Annex III.4 employment lexicon to include 'rank job applicants', 'ranks job applicants', 'job applicants by cv', and ~25 additional natural EN paraphrases. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 4(a).
